hero.headline: Your team ships faster when everyone speaks the same language
hero.subheadline: TaskFlow keeps distributed teams aligned — across time zones, languages, and deadlines. Less chaos, more shipping.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: No IT ticket required. No complicated setup. Just connect and go.

step1.title: Connect your project
step1.description: Link your GitHub repo, upload your files, or hit our API directly. TaskFlow plugs into your workflow without disrupting it.

step2.title: Invite your team
step2.description: Add translators, reviewers, and developers in seconds. Everyone gets exactly the access they need — and nothing they shouldn't.

step3.title: Ship in every language
step3.description: Review, approve, and export. One-click integrations push translations straight to where your code lives.

features.sectionSubtitle: Simple enough to use on day one. Powerful enough to never outgrow.

card1.title: Real-time collaboration
card1.description: See changes as they happen. No refreshing, no version conflicts — just seamless teamwork across every time zone.

card2.title: Smart deadlines
card2.description: Automatic reminders and workload balancing keep your releases on track without micromanagement or spreadsheets.

card3.title: Integrations you already use
card3.description: Works with Slack, GitHub, Figma, and 50+ other tools your team relies on. Setup takes minutes, not weeks.

testimonial.quote: We cut our localization cycle from three weeks down to two days. I still can't quite believe it.
testimonial.author: Sarah Chen

cta.headline: Stop copy-pasting translations into spreadsheets
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of teams who've made localization the least stressful part of their release process.

footer.tagline: Built for teams that move fast.
